text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Illinois State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? "I don't like talking about this. I don't get any information out of it. - Okay, you have a nice one.
